title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HP India:
HP India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India!
